intro: A plain roundup of the week's notable military and business technology (full analysis was unavailable this run).

deep_dives.title: SK Oceanplant Delivers Second Ulsan-class Batch-III Frigate to ROK Navy
deep_dives.what_happened: SK Oceanplant has delivered the second Ulsan-class (FFX) Batch-III frigate, ROKS Gyeongbuk, to the Republic of Korea (ROK) Navy. SK Oceanplant Press Release Translated by Naval News SK Oceanplant announced on June 19 that it has delivered the ROK Navy’s latest frigate, ROKS Gyeongbuk, ahead of the original end-June schedule. The delivery ceremony was held ... The post SK Oceanplant Delivers Second Ulsan-class Batch-III Frigate to ROK Navy appeared first on Naval News .

deep_dives.title: Highway patrol: US Marine F-35s conduct flight operations on Finnish roads
deep_dives.what_happened: The first ever deployment of U.S. Marine Corps F-35B Lightning IIs to Finland proved to be a memorable one.

deep_dives.title: Army launches new Indo-Pacific multi-domain command
deep_dives.what_happened: The move combines traditional formations with some of the service’s cyber, space, unmanned systems and electronic warfare capabilities.

deep_dives.title: New Air Force VC-25B “Bridge” Jet Has Joined The Presidential Airlift Group (Updated)
deep_dives.what_happened: The new Air Force One jet will undergo a final round of tests before ferrying President Donald Trump. The post New Air Force VC-25B “Bridge” Jet Has Joined The Presidential Airlift Group (Updated) appeared first on The War Zone .

deep_dives.title: Air Force One begins commissioning flights, final step before presidential use
deep_dives.what_happened: The service announced the delivery of the Qatari-donated aircraft to Joint Base Andrews on Friday and the kickoff of its commissioning flights.

deep_dives.title: Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week
deep_dives.what_happened: Holy s&*t... the Playstation just broke. The post Bunker Talk: Let’s Talk About All The Things We Did And Didn’t Cover This Week appeared first on The War Zone .

deep_dives.title: Pentagon tells lawmakers it needs $80 billion for Iran war, other expenses: WSJ
deep_dives.what_happened: The full cost of the conflict, which the U.S. launched alongside Israel on Feb. 28, has remained an open question on Capitol Hill.

deep_dives.title: RC-135 Rivet Joints Could Control Drones To Drastically Expand Collection Capabilities
deep_dives.what_happened: Teaming with drones could be a path to new operational possibilities for the Rivet Joint, and other developments are on the horizon. The post RC-135 Rivet Joints Could Control Drones To Drastically Expand Collection Capabilities appeared first on The War Zone .
